nasb.text: who delivered us from so great a peril of death, and will deliver us, He on whom we have set our hope. And He will yet deliver us,

esv.text: He delivered us from such a deadly peril, and he will deliver us. On him we have set our hope that he will deliver us again.

cnv.text: 他救我們脫離了那極大的死亡，而且他還要救我們，我們希望他將來仍要救我們。

ccb.text: 祂曾救我们脱离死亡的威胁，将来还要救我们。我们深信祂必继续救我们。

csbs.text: 他救我们脱离了如此致命的危险，并且将来要救我们——我们盼望他将来还要救我们。
